domain: Hokulea Polynesian voyaging celestial+dead-reckoning hybrid (continuous dead-reckoning state propagation + intermittent independent celestial-latitude checkpoint with partial-state update only)
specific_mechanism: Two parallel position estimates: cumulative DR + intermittent independent celestial latitude; on discrepancy, update only current position without restarting; deliberate decompose-into-latitude-band subgoal strategy.
llm_application: HOKULEA-HOLD: at K predetermined checkpoint positions in a long Chain-of-Thought reasoning trace, spawn a LIGHTWEIGHT INDEPENDENT VERIFICATION SUB-CALL using a DIFFERENT PROMPT REFORMULATION (e.g., 'estimate the answer to subgoal X from scratch using only the original question, without seeing the prior reasoning'). Compare result to the CoT's current intermediate state; if discrepancy > ε, PARTIAL-UPDATE only the current state (single-token correction or short patch) and continue the trace — DO NOT restart the trace and DO NOT use the independent estimate as the answer. Different from chain-of-thought self-consistency (full N retries) and PRM scoring (just score not patch).
novelty_claim: Self-consistency runs N full samples and votes. PRM (process reward model) scores each step but does not patch. Reflexion/CRITIC runs full retry on error. Decomposition methods (least-to-most, plan-then-solve) decompose but do not partial-patch. HOKULEA-HOLD differs by INDEPENDENT-CHANNEL INTERMEDIATE-STATE VERIFICATION + PARTIAL-PATCH (not retry, not score, not decompose).
